title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 98.
content:
There was an Old Man with an owl,
    Who continued to bother and howl;
    He sate on a rail,
    And imbibed bitter ale,
    Which refreshed that Old Man and his owl.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 98."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
